docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JULY 30, 2018. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKEN THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JULY 30, 2018. BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT DETAINED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, CASSANDRA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT DAVIS, CASSANDRA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-30-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOPRIVNIKAR, ALES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, CASSANDRA $3,181.06 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,301.06, DEFENDANT'S DUTY & CARE PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA VEHICLE CODE SECTION 22100(B) WAS BREACHED CAUSING INJURY AND DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF IN THE SUM AWARDED FOR BIKE DAMAGE ($2,432.06), AND HELMET DAMAGE ($749.00) PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,935.00 FILED BY KOPRIVNIKAR, ALES AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, CASSANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT DAVIS, CASSANDRA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $70.00) SERVED MAY-05-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, CASSANDRA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY KOPRIVNIKAR, ALES DAVIS, CASSANDRA
